scripts.start:lib: npm run build:lib && npm run start
scripts.build:lib: ng build ngx-signal-forms --configuration production && rm -rf projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist/node_modules projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist/package-lock.json && cp README.md LICENSE projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist/ && npx postcss 'projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist/styles/**/*.css' --dir 'projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist/styles' --use cssnano --no-map && find projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist/ -name '*.map' -delete
scripts.pack:analyze: (cd projects/ngx-signal-forms/dist && npm pack && PKG=ngx-signals-forms-*.tgz && echo $PKG && echo '=== Uncompressed JS/CSS/TS ===' && tar tvf $PKG | grep -E 'package/(fesm2022/.*\.mjs|styles/.*\.css|types/.*\.d\.ts)$' | awk '{print $NF, $5/1024 "KB"; total+=$5} END {print "TOTAL:", total/1024 "KB"}' && echo '=== Tarball size ===' && du -sh $PKG && rm $PKG)
